Context: Vendors that filed at least one VAT return in the period. Active rate = Active/Registered x 100. Non-filers may be under audit or dormant.
VAT collected at point of import by SARS Customs. Typically ~42% of total VAT revenue. Reflects volume of imported goods.
Total registered VAT vendors (threshold: R1 million annual turnover). Includes dormant and non-filing vendors.
1st provisional CIT payment Ś due 6 months before year-end. Based on estimated taxable income.
Total CIT paid via provisional tax (1st + 2nd + 3rd period payments). Differs from assessed tax due to timing and refunds.
2nd provisional CIT payment Ś due at financial year-end. Revised estimate of full-year taxable income.
Corporate Income Tax assessed by SARS for the tax year after assessed losses set off. CIT rate: 27% since 2022 (was 28%).
Optional 3rd provisional CIT payment Ś due 6 months after year-end to avoid interest on underpayments.
